title: ALN Token Database (tokens.json) — v1
description: Schema for the shared token definitions produced by scripts/sync_notion_to_tokens.py and consumed by the backend orchestrator, GM scanner, web player scanner, and ESP32 scanner. v1 documents the CURRENT format, including the 'Name (xN)' SF_Group microformat — a structured group field is planned (Phase 2 backlog) and will be v2. Invariant not expressible here: each token's SF_RFID must equal its object key (enforced by the backend contract test and the sync script's alignment check).

image.description: Memory image shown by player scanners, relative to the token-data root. BMP only — the ESP32 renderer cannot decode other formats

audio.description: Memory audio played by player scanners, relative to the token-data root

video.description: Video filename (no path) played by the orchestrator on TV when a player scans this token

processingImage.description: Interstitial image shown while a video token is queued. BMP only, as with image

SF_RFID.description: Token identifier — MUST equal this token's object key

SF_ValueRating.description: 1-5 star rating; multiplied with the SF_MemoryType multiplier per ALN-TokenData/scoring-config.json

SF_MemoryType.description: Memory type driving the scoring multiplier. null is tolerated but scores 0x (UNKNOWN) — the sync script warns

SF_Group.description: Group membership microformat: '' (no group) or 'Group Name (xN)' where N is the completion multiplier. All members of a group must carry the identical string

summary.description: Public summary shown on the scoreboard when the token is exposed via a Detective transaction

owner.description: Character who owns this memory (resolved from Notion's Elements→Characters relation, role prefix stripped)
